en_title: Persona Live-Action TV Show in the Works at Netflix
cn_title: Netflix《女神异闻录》真人剧集正在开发中
subtitle: 剧情会取材哪部游戏？
opus_summary: 据《综艺》报道，Netflix将开发《女神异闻录》真人剧集，Christopher Monfette任编剧及剧集主管，《怪奇物语》制片人Shawn Levy参。

paragraphs.en: A live-action Persona TV show is reportedly in development at Netflix.
paragraphs.cn: 据传，Netflix正在开发一部《女神异闻录》真人剧集。

paragraphs.en: The streamer has begun work on a series adaptation of Sega and Atlus' critically acclaimed RPG franchise, according to Variety . Star Trek: Picard and 9-1-1 alum Christopher Monfette is attached to write the show while also serving as its executive producer and showrunner.
paragraphs.cn: 据《综艺》报道，该流媒体平台已着手将世嘉和Atlus备受好评的RPG系列改编为剧集。《星际迷航：皮卡德》和《紧急呼救》的编剧Christopher Monfette将担任本剧编剧，同时兼任执行制片人和剧集主管。

paragraphs.en: 21 Laps' Shawn Levy and Robert Atwood are also attached to executive produce, as are Dmitri M. Johnson, Michael Lawrence Goldberg, and Timothy I. Stevenson of Story Kitchen. Sega producer Toru Nakahara will also aid as an executive producer. Netflix declined Variety's request for comment.
paragraphs.cn: 21 Laps的Shawn Levy和Robert Atwood也将担任执行制片人，Story Kitchen的Dmitri M. Johnson、迈克尔Lawrence Goldberg和Timothy I. Stevenson同样参与执行制作。世嘉制作人中原徹也将协助担任执行制片人。Netflix拒绝对《综艺》的置评请求作出回应。

paragraphs.en: It's unclear if its plot will pull directly from any particular entry or tell a new story entirely. Five mainline games, a treasure trove of spin-offs, and even a few remakes have been released since the franchise's inception in 1996, giving the live-action Persona TV show plenty of material to pull from. The most recent numbered entry, Persona 5 , introduced fans to the Phantom Thieves when it first launched in 2016 and expanded the story with Persona 5 Royal in 2024.
paragraphs.cn: 目前尚不清楚剧情是直接取材于某部具体作品，还是会讲述一个全新的故事。自1996年系列诞生以来，已推出5部主线游戏、大量衍生作品甚至几款重制版，为《女神异闻录》真人剧集提供了丰富的素材。最新一部编号作品《女神异闻录5》在2016年首次发售时向粉丝们介绍了「怪盗团」，并于2024年通过《女神异闻录5皇家版》拓展了剧情。

paragraphs.en: Although nothing story-wise is confirmed yet, fans will surely waste no time spinning theories about what elements or characters may carry over to the series adaptation. As the project is early in development, release date and casting details also have yet to be announced.
paragraphs.cn: 尽管剧情方面尚未得到任何确认，但粉丝们肯定会立刻开始推测哪些元素或角色可能会出现在这部改编剧集中。由于该项目仍处于早期开发阶段，播出日期和选角细节也尚未公布。

paragraphs.en: Netflix has most notably worked with 21 Laps on its sci-fi mega hit Stranger Things, which ended late last year. It was also involved in the production of other television projects like The Perfect Couple and Last Man Standing. Its movie credits include Deadpool & Wolverine (which Levy directed) and Backrooms, with future projects like Star Wars: Starfighter (which Levy is also directing) in the cards.
paragraphs.cn: Netflix最著名的合作是与21 Laps共同打造的科幻巨制《怪奇物语》，该剧已于去年年底完结。此外，还参与了《完美伴侣》和《最后一人》等其他电视剧项目的制作。其电影作品包括《死侍与金刚狼》（Levy执导）和《后室》，未来还有《星球大战：星际战斗机》（同样由Levy执导）等项目在计划中。

paragraphs.en: Story Kitchen has pursued a number of video game adaptations in the past. The company most famously backed Sega's live-action Sonic the Hedgehog movies, but its plans for the future including projects based on Sifu , It Takes Two , Just Cause , Life is Strange , and more.
paragraphs.cn: Story Kitchen过去曾致力于多部游戏改编项目。该公司最著名的是支持世嘉的真人《刺猬索尼克》电影，但其未来计划还包括基于《师父》《双人成行》《正当防卫》《奇异人生》等作品的改编项目。

paragraphs.en: It may be some time before Netflix's live-action Persona TV show materializes into something more. While we wait for updates, you can read about how the streaming giant is still trying to bring its Gears of War movie to life. You can also catch up on Persona 4 Revival and Persona 6 , which was announced after years of anticipation at the Xbox Games Showcase earlier this month.
paragraphs.cn: 可能还需要一段时间，Netflix的《女神异闻录》真人剧集才会进一步成型。

pending_dict.reason: 暂无官方中文译名，暂译为重制版
世嘉制作人，推测汉字名
